description: Use this API to specify or return the option to enable or disable multi-section line reporting. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = multisection_reporting(ival) ierr, ival = multisection_reporting()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 1 by default; else output).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
